---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Argus
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation you're facing. Focus on the use case, not just the solution.

Example: "When analyzing flash loan attacks, I have to manually cross-reference multiple TX hashes because..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Which Module?

- [ ] Sentinel (real-time detection)
- [ ] Autopsy (post-hack forensics)
- [ ] Time-Travel Debugger
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] AI Agent
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references that help explain the feature.
